Plaintiff Petros Abramyan'S Motion To Compel Defendant Ed Rayos Verified Responses To Written Discovery Requests And Interrogatories
Off Calendar Jun-19-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Aleksandr Volkov, Esq. 415-987-7000 for Plaintiff.
Ed Rayos, 415-309-4503 Defendant in Pro Per.

Both sides stipulate to the Judge Pro Tem.

RULING - A R G U E D. Hearing is held. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

Plaintiff Petros Abramyan'S Motion To Compel Defendant Ed Rayos Verified Responses To Written Discovery Requests And Interrogatories.

Granted. Defendant to provide documents in three weeks. Plaintiff to submit a proposed order that is verbatim with the Court's ruling in compliance with CRC 3.1312 directly to the Judge Pro Tem at pcatalanotti@fmglaw.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Peter Catalanotti, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not reported. =(302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Defendant Ed Rayos Verified Responses To Written Discovery Requests And Interrogatories
Off Calendar Jun-06-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Ed Rayos, Defendant in Pro Per, 415-309-4503.

Hearing is held. The Court read aloud the tentative ruling to Ed.

The Court adopts the modified tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF PETROS ABRAMYAN Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Defendant Ed Rayos Verified Responses To Written Discovery Requests And Interrogatories is CONTINUED to June 19, 2019 in Dept. 301 at 9:00 AM. Parties shall comply with SFLR 2.7B and deliver courtesy copies to Dept. 301 no later than June 10, 2019 with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. = (501/CFH). Judge Charles F. Haines, Clerk: N. Wong, Not reported (D501)
